privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. All metadata claims refer to fictional entities in a synthetic law enforcement training environment using GTAV data: Franklin Clinton is a fictional character from Grand Theft Auto V with assigned ID 2 in the ncic_names table; Forum Drive and Strawberry Avenue are fictional GTAV locations; citation values (Running Red Light citation with $175.00 fine) are task requirements for verification purposes, not real legal data.
